stories.title: Registered user can log in with valid credentials
stories.goal: log in with my email and password
stories.acceptanceCriteria:
Given I am on /login
When I submit my correct email and password
Then I am redirected to /dashboard and see "Signed in as alice@example.com"

stories.title: Wrong password is rejected with an error
stories.goal: be told when my password is wrong
stories.benefit: I know to try again rather than assume the site is broken
stories.acceptanceCriteria:
Given I am on /login
When I submit a correct email with a wrong password
Then I stay on /login and see the alert "Invalid email or password."

stories.title: Anonymous visitor cannot reach the dashboard
stories.goal: be kept out of pages that need an account
stories.acceptanceCriteria:
Given I am not logged in
When I navigate to /dashboard
Then I am redirected to /login

stories.title: Contact form rejects an invalid email address
stories.goal: be told immediately when I mistype my email
stories.benefit: the reply actually reaches me instead of bouncing
stories.acceptanceCriteria:
Given I am on /contact
When I submit "notanemail" as my email address
Then the form is rejected and I see "Please enter a valid email address."
